items.title: Recordjager Kane ligt precies op Lewandowski-schema
items.summary: Harry Kane tilde zaterdag zijn doelpuntenproductie in dit Bundesliga-seizoen naar 28 door tweemaal te scoren tegen Eintracht Frankfurt. Het record van Robert Lewandowski komt snel in zicht als de Engelsman zo doorgaat.

items.title: VI Live: PSV vlak voor rust weer naast Heerenveen in kansenfestival
items.summary: PSV krijgt zaterdagavond bezoek van SC Heerenveen. De koploper van de Eredivisie heeft wat recht te zetten na de nederlaag van vorige week tegen FC Volendam. Het Eredivisie-duel start om 18.45 uur en volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: Scotland leave it late to edge Wales in Cardiff
items.summary: Scotland left it late to deny Wales a first Six Nations victory for three years, edging in front with five minutes to play to seal a 26-23 victory in Cardiff.

items.title: West Ham v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from the 5.30pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | And email Taha 9 min: Summerville shows off his quick feet inside his own half as West Ham try and counter. 8 min: It’s an aerial game as the sides play volleyball inside the Bournemouth half. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Summerville begint dreigend, Real Madrid op achterstand in Pamplona
items.summary: Zaterdagavond staat er met NAC Breda tegen FC Volendam een ware degradatiekraker op het programma. De duels van PSV en Ajax volgen we in een apart liveblog. Verder staat ons een druk programma in het buitenland te wachten. Mis niets met VI Live.

items.title: Emery reflects on 'deserved draw' against Leeds
items.summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery remains upbeat after their draw with Leeds United, saying the result is a point gained rather than two points lost.

items.title: Chelsea lacked ruthlessness in Burnley draw - Rosenior
items.summary: Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior believes his side lacked the ruthlessness in their 1-1 draw with Burnley at Stamford Bridge in the Premier League.

items.title: From £70 a week to Premier League record 24 years later
items.summary: James Milner has broken the Premier League appearance record, 24 years after making his debut as a 16-year-old.

items.title: Farke 'proud' of his warriors despite disappointment with Villa draw
items.summary: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is "disappointed" with his side's late draw against Aston Villa but believes the result is a "fair outcome" in an "equal game".

items.title: Bejubelde Flemming hoopt op ontsnapping Burnley: 'We geven niet op'
items.summary: Zian Flemming hoopt dat zijn doelpunt en het gelijkspel tegen Chelsea inspirerend kunnen werken voor Burnley in de strijd tegen degradatie. De Nederlander maakte zaterdag zijn zesde Premier League-goal voor de huidige nummer negentien op de ranglijst.

items.title: 'Drive and hunger' take Milner to Premier League appearance record
items.summary: Brighton's James Milner starts against Brentford to break the all-time Premier League appearance record in his 654th match.

items.title: Heerenveen-duo te laat voor kraker tegen PSV: 'Stond daar ook vol onbegrip'
items.summary: De keuzes in de opstelling van SC Heerenveen werden zaterdag gemaakt voor trainer Robin Veldman. De trainer verwelkomde Hristiyan Petrov en Jacob Trenskow terug in de basis. Dat ging ten koste van Maxence Rivera en Vasilios Zagaritis, die te laat kwamen.

items.title: Sources: Prestianni told UEFA he used anti-gay slur
items.summary: Gianluca Prestianni has already given evidence in UEFA's investigation into his alleged racist abuse of Vinícius Júnior, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Wrexham come back to win chaotic 8-goal thriller
items.summary: Wrexham boosted their promotion hopes with a 5-3 victory over fellow high-fliers Ipswich in a crazy game at the Stok Cae Ras.

items.title: 654 and counting: Milner becomes PL record holder
items.summary: James Milner has broken the record for the most appearances in Premier League history.

items.title: Infantino to face no IOC action over Trump event
items.summary: The International Olympic Committee will take no action against its member Gianni Infantino for a possible breach of political neutrality rules over aligning FIFA with U.S. President Donald Trump's Board of Peace.

items.title: Fofana sees red as Chelsea draw with Burnley
items.summary: Chelsea's 10 men were stunned by a Zian Flemming header in the third minute of added time as Burnley stole a 1-1 draw at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Tammy Abraham salvages late point for Aston Villa to deny battling Leeds
items.summary: It felt like the day Aston Villa’s faint title hopes were extinguished despite Tammy Abraham’s late equaliser. Anton Stach’s incredible free-kick looked set to secure the win for Leeds until the 88th minute but it felt like another important point in their fight for survival. Unai Emery’s side have only won once in their past four Premier League home games and fell short once more to leave them seven points behind leaders Arsenal. They were punished for a sloppy opening 45 minutes when they failed to get almost anything right against their more aggressive opponents. Continue reading...

items.title: Flemming earns last-gasp draw for Burnley after Chelsea’s Fofana sees red
items.summary: Chelsea got what they deserved here. They had been coasting to fourth courtesy of an early João Pedro goal, but the second-half dismissal of Wesley Fofana gave a glimmer to a Burnley team previously clinging on. Liam Rosenior’s side desperately tried to run down the clock, only to allow an unmarked Zian Flemming to nod home a James Ward-Prowse corner in added time. It might have been worse, as Jacob Bruun Larsen nodded an identical Ward-Prowse corner over the bar. Rust the culprit? Chelsea’s players had enjoyed four days off given to them by Rosenior, Cole Palmer heading a winter sun delegation to Dubai in a rare midweek without competitive action. Estêvão was an absentee after a hamstring problem picked up on his return to training. Roméo Lavia, missing since November, on the bench was a point of intrigue, after the news he had spent his convalescence fine-tuning his decision making with the help of virtual reality. Continue reading...

items.title: James Milner breaks appearance record to help Brighton win at Brentford
items.summary: Brighton marked James Milner’s record-breaking 654th Premier League appearance with a much-needed win at Brentford. The pressure had mounted on the Brighton manager Fabian Hürzeler after a run of one league win in 13 and he turned to veteran midfielder Milner in attempt to arrest a worrying run of results. Continue reading...
